channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Lost 1,200-year-old manuscript contains the first English poem
item.description: A rediscovered manuscript in Rome holds one of the oldest known versions of the earliest poem written in English.

item.title: Stunning 150-million-year-old stegosaur skull rewrites dinosaur evolution
item.description: A remarkably preserved stegosaur skull found in Spain offers new insights into dinosaur evolution.

item.title: Memory loss reversed by recharging the brain's tiny engines, scientists find
item.description: For the first time, researchers show that faulty mitochondria may directly cause cognitive decline in ne...

item.title: First direct image of cosmic web reveals universe's hidden highways
item.description: Astronomers captured the sharpest image yet of a filament in the cosmic web, the vast hidden structure linking galaxies across...
